params.name: Palermo Stone
params.description:
On Jun 8, 2875 BC, the Palermo Stone was located in an ancient temple.
The Palermo Stone is probably the oldest historical text that has survived from Ancient Egypt. It is inscribed with hieroglyphics on both sides, which record the history and culture of the first five dynasties of ancient Egypt, including a list of the kings of Egypt and significant events in each year of their reigns. The Palermo Stone is held in the Regional Archeological Museum Antonio Salinas in the city of Palermo, fro …
